title: Wedding planning service WBS level 1 deliverables
overview: Lists the seven level 1 deliverable categories in the wedding planning service example.
detailed_summary: The wedding planning service WBS includes seven categories of deliverables at level 1: Attire for the Wedding Party, Ceremony, Reception, Rehearsal Dinner, Bridal Lunch, Accommodations, and Transportation. These represent the major service-related deliverable groupings that could be included for a given wedding project.
content: In the wedding planning service example, the WBS begins with seven top-level branches: Attire for the Wedding Party, Ceremony, Reception, Rehearsal Dinner, Bridal Lunch, Accommodations, and Transportation. These categories capture the major service areas that can be provided to the customer as part of the wedding planning solution.
relationships: These categories define the top-level structure of the wedding planning service WBS
search_queries: What are the top-level deliverables in a wedding planning WBS?
common_questions: What level 1 branches are in the wedding planning WBS?
How can wedding services be represented in a WBS?
What are the main deliverable categories for a wedding planning project?
can_answer: How service scope is grouped in the wedding example
best_practices: Use top-level service categories to make optional scope choices visible to the customer.
warnings: Leaving expected service categories undefined can create omissions in schedule and budget.
limitations: Not every wedding will require all seven top-level categories.
troubleshooting: If a wedding project has a different service mix, tailor the WBS by removing unused categories or adding needed ones.
decision_rules: Include only the service branches the customer chooses to use for the specific wedding project.
